headline: Atmos Energy Q2 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: ATO beats Q2 earnings estimates as operating income jumps 22% and net income rises nearly 20% year over year.

headline: Spire Q2 Earnings Miss Expectations, Revenues Decrease Y/Y
summary: SR's fiscal Q2 adjusted EPS comes below estimates, and revenues slip to $1.02 billion, while operating income rises to $303.5 million.

headline: Atmos (ATO) Q2 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
summary: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Atmos (ATO) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended March 2026, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.
